PROJECTS WORKSHOPS MUSIC BIO RESUME EXHIBITIONS RESIDENCIES EVENTS WRITINGS

Residencies & Grants

Collaborative research fellowships and studio program residencies exploring experimental electronics and sculpture.

🏛️ Residencies

  • Studio Residency Artist Fellowship — Residency Organization, City, Country (Year)

Two-month studio program focused on large-scale optical prisms and real-time sonic modulation.

  • Creative Technology Research Residency — Technology Lab / Institute Name, City, Country (Year)

Research fellowship prototyping custom microcontrollers for spatial light projection.

💰 Selected Grants

  • Emerging Artist Production Grant — Fine Arts Council / Institution Name (Year)

Funding support for solo exhibition hardware development and custom glass fabrication.

  • Creative Media Research Grant — Academic Science & Tech Foundation (Year)

Support for collaborative projects examining decomposing raw vegetable fibers in high-humidity chambers.
